message:
fix(io): add yield counters to prevent fast readers/writers from starving executor

ReadToEnd, ReadToString, WriteAll, and WriteAllBuf futures now carry a
yield_counter: u8 field. Every time the inner poll returns Ready (data
transferred), the counter increments. After 32 consecutive ready polls
without yielding, the future voluntarily yields by calling
cx.waker().wake_by_ref() and returning Poll::Pending. When the
underlying reader/writer returns a real Pending, the counter resets.

Without this, a read_to_end on a fully-buffered in-memory stream would
spin in a tight loop without ever yielding to other tasks, causing
starvation of every other future on the same executor thread.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
